title: Delicate Dyes
description: A mod to spice the color variety by adding new dyes.
body:
![A multicolored banner reading "delicate dyes"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/new_assets/banner_ddyes_header.png)

Delicate Dyes is a mod for Minecraft that expands upon the color selection available for building by introducing 10 new dyes to the game. Each new dye features a complete set of features, such as wool, beds, shulkers, and more.

### For Developers
If you are looking to add integration with Delicate Dyes and your project you can find a pallete of the dyes by [clicking here](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Delicate-Dyes/raw/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/colors.png).

[![White text reading "Requires RunicLib"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/mod_page_assets/descriptions/ddyes_requires_rl.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/runiclib)

_Feel free to include this project in modpacks!_

![A multicolored banner reading "features"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/new_assets/banner_ddyes_features.png)

- Features 10 new dyes, Coral, Umber, Canary, Wasabi, Sacramento, Sky, Blurple, Lavender, Sangria, and Rose!
- Each dye comes with it's complete set of features such as wool, beds, fireworks, etc
- Features a couple new flowers to obtain some of the dyes with
- Features integration with other mods such as [Bountiful Fares](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares), [Urban Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/urban-decor), and [Frontiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/frontiers-mod)

![A multicolored banner reading "projects"](https://github.com/Yirmiri/Yirmiri/raw/main/new_assets/banner_ddyes_projects.png)

# Additional Credits
This section is dedicated to those that contributed to this mod as this project wouldn't have been as easy or possible if it weren't for the help of these talented people!

## [Hecco](https://twitter.com/Hecco):
- Artist behind most vanilla assets for Coral, Canary, Wasabi, Sacramento, Blurple and Lavender dyes.
- Artist behind all Glazed Terracottas, Dye Items, and various integration textures.

## [arid_lizzy](https://twitter.com/tellioaridoitsu):
- Artist behind Llama Carpets and the Goob Blossom.
- Created the original palette for Umber dye.
